description: Registry of model identifiers and version pins that appear in skills, so the health loop can detect hard-coded values that drift out of date. Refresh the `last_verified` date when a skill's slugs are checked against live provider docs. Slugs are intentionally NOT enumerated here — hard-coding them is exactly what this file exists to flag. See skills/AGENTS.md 'Adding a Skill'.
guidance: Any skill matching a flag_pattern carries a hard-coded model slug that will drift. Prefer capability checks (run.supports(...), Cursor.models.list()) or document 'refresh against provider docs' rather than pinning a slug.
